title: BEM-872 probe mailbox tokens
objective:
Run script:
"""
mail = Path('governance/audit/mailbox/from_curator/BEM872_ROADMAP_AGREEMENT_RESPONSE.md')
text = mail.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore') if mail.exists() else ''
flags = []
for token in ['Status: APPROVED_WITH_NOTES','Findings:','Evidence:','Roadmap:','Strategic variants:','Recommendation:']:
    flags.append(token.replace(':','').replace(' ','_') + '_' + str(token in text))
flags.append('len_' + str(len(text)))
safe = '_'.join(flags).replace('True','T').replace('False','F')[:180]
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM872_MAILBOX_TOKEN_PROBE_' + safe + '.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-872 mailbox token probe\nFlags: ' + safe + '\n\nText:\n' + text[:5000] + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('BEM872 mailbox token probe: ' + safe)
"""
No issue comments.
